user_query: I want to get better at playing piano. Add a new learning project called 'Piano Practice' and add a task to practice scales for 30 minutes every day.

fields.name: Piano Practice
fields.description: Project to improve piano skills. Initial plan: include a recurring task to practice scales for 30 minutes every day.

result.reasoning: Add a new learning project under Learning. Appending at end since no specific position requested; description notes the requested daily 30-minute scales practice so the project can be populated with that task.
